description_long: This object is a small potted plant featuring a cylindrical pot with a marbled terracotta appearance. The pot is filled with dark, granular soil, from which a single upright green stem emerges. The stem is adorned with several broad, serrated green leaves arranged in pairs along its length. The pot's surface displays a swirling, earthy pattern, giving it a rustic and natural look. The plant appears young, with only a few leaves and a slender stem, suggesting it is in an early growth stage. There are no visible decorative elements or labels attached to the pot or plant.
description: A small, marbled terracotta-style pot containing a young green plant with broad, serrated leaves and dark soil. The pot has a rustic, swirling pattern and the plant is in an early growth stage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marbled pot, dark soil, and the plant's stem with two pairs of broad green leaves facing forward.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slender profile of the stem and leaves, with only one leaf visible and the marbled pot's pattern more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the plant with the same leaf arrangement as the front, and the marbled pot's pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the stem and a single leaf visible, highlighting the cylindrical shape and marbled texture of the pot.
attribute_plant_species: young broadleaf plant (generic, possibly Ficus or similar)
